# Research Result

## Executive Summary
HITL Perplexity research result for workflow validation. The result explains how a user can manually run a research prompt and bring the markdown output back into the pipeline.

## Key Findings
- HITL keeps API keys out of the MVP workflow.
- A saved Markdown result can be parsed and evaluated like a mock result.
- The same report builder can publish final Markdown and HTML outputs.
